questions.question: The purpose of Rutherford's gold foil experiment was

answers.b: to test the plum pudding model of an atom
answers.c: to measure the charge of an electron

questions.question: Before Rutherford experiment, it was believed that in an atom the electrons

answers.c: are embedded in positively charged sphere
answers.d: are embedded in negatively charged sphere
